title.rendered: AMI Announces Aptio V Support for Qualcomm Dragonwing IQ-X and Dragonwing QCS6490 IoT Platforms

content.rendered:
Expanding Innovation Through Strategic Collaboration

AMI and Qualcomm are excited to announce that AMI’s industry-leading Aptio® V UEFI Firmware now offers full support for Qualcomm’s next-gen Dragonwing™ IoT platforms, the Qualcomm Dragonwing™ IQ-X and Qualcomm Dragonwing™ QCS6490. This milestone is the result of a close collaboration between AMI and Qualcomm to deliver robust, secure, and scalable firmware solutions for the next generation of IoT devices.

By combining AMI’s advanced UEFI firmware technology with Qualcomm Technologies’ cutting-edge IoT platforms, OEMs and developers can now access multiple operating systems through a single firmware image, accelerate their product development cycles, and enhance NPU-powered AI features.

For OEMs, ODMs and data center operators across the cloud, edge and IoT, Aptio V is the first choice for reliable, proven UEFI firmware to power up processors, peripherals and interfaces for today’s dynamic workloads. By combining feature-rich platform packages that are modular and easy to integrate, Aptio V ensures that the platform bring-up journey is efficient, cost-effective, reliable and on schedule.

“Qualcomm is thrilled to collaborate with AMI to bring advanced UEFI firmware support to our latest IoT platforms,” says Anand Venkatesan, Senior Director of Product Management at Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. “AMI’s expertise in firmware fortifies our ecosystem and helps developers to innovate faster, with seamless interoperability.”

Srini Narayana, Vice President of Boot Firmware Technologies Group at AMI, commented that “This partnership underscores both companies’ commitment to providing best-in-class solutions that drive the future of industrial and embedded IoT and edge computing. We look forward to continued collaboration with Qualcomm to bring transformative products such as the Dragonwing IoT platforms to market.”

For more information about Aptio V UEFI Firmware from AMI, visit https://www.ami.com/aptio/.

AMI is a registered trademark of AMI US Holdings, Inc. Dragonwing is a trademark of Qualcomm Technologies Inc. Qualcomm branded products are products of Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. and/or its subsidiaries. Qualcomm patents are licensed by Qualcomm Incorporated.  All other trademarks and registered trademarks are the property of their respective owners in the US and other countries.

About AMI

AMI is Firmware Reimagined for modern computing. As a global leader in Dynamic Firmware for security, orchestration, and manageability solutions, AMI enables the world’s compute platforms from on-premises to the cloud to the edge. AMI’s industry-leading foundational technology and unwavering customer support have generated lasting partnerships and spurred innovation for some of the most prominent brands in the high-tech industry.
